title: elymus cordilleranus
intro: Elymus cordilleranus, also known as the Cordilleran wheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elymus cordilleranus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
